name: County Income & Education
description: Per capita income vs bachelor's degree percentage for 3,142 US counties (IMS Ch. 2)
studyDescription: Per capita income and educational attainment data for 3,142 US counties from the American Community Survey (2019). Strong positive association between bachelor's degree attainment and per capita income. This is an observational study of US Census data.

variableDescriptions.bachelors_pct: Percentage of the county population age 25+ holding a bachelor's degree or higher (ACS 2019).
variableDescriptions.per_capita_income: Per capita income in US dollars for the county (ACS 2019).

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS, Chapter 2 Exercise 28. Source: US Census ACS 2019 via usdata::county_complete R package. Public data.
